title: vangueria infausta subsp. rotundata
intro: Vangueria infausta subsp. rotundata, also known as the round-leaved veldt grape or red milkberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Vangueria infausta subsp. rotundata include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are made by infusing the leaves and fruits in hot water to create a tea, and the plant is also used to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
